alt: Detailed archival specimen showing the developing plumage of a young superb bird-of-paradise
caption: Young males initially maintain cryptic, female-like brown plumage for several years to avoid aggression from mature territorial males.
acquisitionNotes: High-resolution museum archival image documenting developmental plumage stages. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/6/6c/Lophorina_superba_superba_%2848719817767%29.jpg
